goal: Build a recycling multi-sensor station: 4 cubes (different materials — plastic/metal/glass/cardboard) flow on conveyor past barcode_reader + nir_material_sensor; routed to material-specific bins. Realizes #18 Recycling Multi-Sensor.
thoughts:
Six recycling-multi-sensor specifics for CP-66:
1) 4 cubes representing 4 materials: plastic (gray), metal (silver), glass (cyan-tint), cardboard (brown).
2) Each cube has set_semantic_label semantic_type='material' with class_name matching material.
3) Barcode reader at conveyor pre-pick zone — reads cube identity.
4) NIR material sensor at conveyor pick zone — reads material:type attr.
5) 4 destination bins (one per material). color_routing matches material-class to bin.
6) Realizes #18 multi-sensor recycling station.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1500.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

create_material(material_path="/World/Mats/Plastic",   shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.6, 0.6, 0.6])
create_material(material_path="/World/Mats/Metal",     shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.85, 0.85, 0.85])
create_material(material_path="/World/Mats/Glass",     shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.7, 0.95, 0.95])
create_material(material_path="/World/Mats/Cardboard", shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.5, 0.35, 0.2])

material_specs = [
    ("/World/Cube_1", -1.4,  "plastic",   "Plastic"),
    ("/World/Cube_2", -1.15, "metal",     "Metal"),
    ("/World/Cube_3", -0.9,  "glass",     "Glass"),
    ("/World/Cube_4", -0.65, "cardboard", "Cardboard"),
]
for path, x, mat_class, mat_name in material_specs:
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)
    assign_material(prim_path=path, material_path=f"/World/Mats/{mat_name}")
    set_semantic_label(prim_path=path, class_name=mat_class, semantic_type="material")

bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=[c[0] for c in material_specs], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
for c in material_specs:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=c[0], material_name="rubber")

# Pre-pick sensors
barcode_reader_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/BarcodeReader",
    position=[-0.3, 0.4, 0.85],
    scan_radius=0.05,
)
nir_material_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/NirSensor",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.85],
    scan_radius=0.05,
)

# 4 destination bins
bin_specs = [
    ("/World/PlasticBin",  -0.45, "Plastic"),
    ("/World/MetalBin",    -0.15, "Metal"),
    ("/World/GlassBin",     0.15, "Glass"),
    ("/World/CardboardBin", 0.45, "Cardboard"),
]
for path, x, mat in bin_specs:
    create_bin(prim_path=path, position=[x, -0.5, 0.75], size=[0.18, 0.18, 0.15])
    assign_material(prim_path=path, material_path=f"/World/Mats/{mat}")

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=[c[0] for c in material_specs],
    destination_path="/World/PlasticBin",
    color_routing={
        "plastic":   "/World/PlasticBin",
        "metal":     "/World/MetalBin",
        "glass":     "/World/GlassBin",
        "cardboard": "/World/CardboardBin",
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/PlasticBin", "/World/MetalBin", "/World/GlassBin", "/World/CardboardBin"],
)
extension_notes: CP-66 combines barcode_reader_sensor + nir_material_sensor with 4-class semantic routing. Uses semantic_type='material' instead of 'color'. cuRobo's color_routing dispatches per material class (Semantics_class API). Realizes #18 Recycling Multi-Sensor.
failure_modes: Sensors are scaffolding — no runtime read logic. color_routing reads pre-set Semantics_class.
4 bins arranged tightly — 0.30m spacing; planning_obstacles avoids each.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-04-XX; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✓ (120s sim. cube_final=(-0.49, -0.46, 0.824) in Bin)
code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1500.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    position={{input_conveyor.position}},
    size={{input_conveyor.size}},
    surface_velocity={{input_conveyor.surface_velocity}},
)

create_material(material_path="/World/Mats/Plastic",   shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.6, 0.6, 0.6])
create_material(material_path="/World/Mats/Metal",     shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.85, 0.85, 0.85])
create_material(material_path="/World/Mats/Glass",     shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.7, 0.95, 0.95])
create_material(material_path="/World/Mats/Cardboard", shader_type="OmniPBR", diffuse_color=[0.5, 0.35, 0.2])

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[0].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name=api)
assign_material(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, material_path="/World/Mats/Plastic")
set_semantic_label(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, class_name="plastic", semantic_type="material")

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[1].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, schema_name=api)
assign_material(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, material_path="/World/Mats/Metal")
set_semantic_label(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, class_name="metal", semantic_type="material")

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[2].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, schema_name=api)
assign_material(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, material_path="/World/Mats/Glass")
set_semantic_label(prim_path={{workpieces[2].path}}, class_name="glass", semantic_type="material")

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[3].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, schema_name=api)
assign_material(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, material_path="/World/Mats/Cardboard")
set_semantic_label(prim_path={{workpieces[3].path}}, class_name="cardboard", semantic_type="material")

bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
for path in [{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# Pre-pick sensors
barcode_reader_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/BarcodeReader",
    position=[-0.3, 0.4, 0.85],
    scan_radius=0.05,
)
nir_material_sensor(
    sensor_path="/World/NirSensor",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.85],
    scan_radius=0.05,
)

# 4 destination bins
create_bin(prim_path={{destinations[0].path}}, position={{destinations[0].position}}, size=[0.18, 0.18, 0.15])
assign_material(prim_path={{destinations[0].path}}, material_path="/World/Mats/Plastic")
create_bin(prim_path={{destinations[1].path}}, position={{destinations[1].position}}, size=[0.18, 0.18, 0.15])
assign_material(prim_path={{destinations[1].path}}, material_path="/World/Mats/Metal")
create_bin(prim_path={{destinations[2].path}}, position={{destinations[2].position}}, size=[0.18, 0.18, 0.15])
assign_material(prim_path={{destinations[2].path}}, material_path="/World/Mats/Glass")
create_bin(prim_path={{destinations[3].path}}, position={{destinations[3].position}}, size=[0.18, 0.18, 0.15])
assign_material(prim_path={{destinations[3].path}}, material_path="/World/Mats/Cardboard")

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}}, position={{pick_sensor.position}}, size={{pick_sensor.size}})

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path={{pick_sensor.path}},
    belt_path={{input_conveyor.path}},
    source_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}, {{workpieces[2].path}}, {{workpieces[3].path}}],
    destination_path={{destinations[0].path}},
    color_routing={
        "plastic":   {{destinations[0].path}},
        "metal":     {{destinations[1].path}},
        "glass":     {{destinations[2].path}},
        "cardboard": {{destinations[3].path}},
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", {{input_conveyor.path}}, {{destinations[0].path}}, {{destinations[1].path}}, {{destinations[2].path}}, {{destinations[3].path}}],
)
